name: OpenCode
author: Resonant Alpha
description: Open-source coding workspace add-on. ResonantOS launches OpenCode as an optional scoped local service, embeds OpenCode's own web UI, and uses the server/API layer for governance and audit.

surfaces.label: OpenCode Workspace
surfaces.description: Open a coding workspace inside the ResonantOS center surface.

notes: OpenCode must return changed files, commands run, verification evidence, and residual risks.
Direct filesystem and process access must stay scoped to the task workspace.

workflowBoundaries.label: Scoped coding workspace
workflowBoundaries.jobToBeDone: Launch OpenCode as a scoped coding workspace with provider routing, filesystem boundaries, and artifact return.
workflowBoundaries.userValue: The human can use an open-source coding IDE under ResonantOS governance without broad shell or filesystem leakage.
nonGoals: Hide commands or changed files from the human
Bypass deterministic verification before task completion

skills.name: OpenCode coding handoff
skills.description: Prepare task scope, workspace path, verification expectations, and artifact return rules for OpenCode.

augmentorSkills.objective: Delegate bounded coding, debugging, refactor, and coding-workspace diagnosis tasks to OpenCode under ResonantOS governance.
workflowPhases: collect changed files and verification artifacts
approvalGates: Human approval is required before OpenCode executes shell commands or broad filesystem work.
OpenCode must return changed files, commands run, verification evidence, and residual risks before completion.
Augmentor must not claim opencode.launch_workspace executed unless ResonantOS returns a concrete host result.
expectedInputs: workspace path or bounded files in scope

connectors.name: OpenCode local service
connectors.description: Starts and embeds an OpenCode service for a selected local workspace.

scripts.name: OpenCode workspace preflight
scripts.description: Verify selected workspace path and service readiness before launching OpenCode.

tools.name: opencode.launch_workspace
tools.description: Start an OpenCode web/server session for a scoped workspace path.
